title: format.request
description: Request to reformat or restyle content according to a target style or layout (e.g., markdown, JSON, tables, code style).

source_style.description: Optional hint of the current style (e.g., plain, markdown, json, code).

target_style.description: Requested target style (e.g., markdown, bullet-list, table, json-block).

guidelines.description: Optional additional guidelines (e.g., max line width, heading depth).
